title: Moongazer Serpent
content:
Moongazer Serpents
 are parasites that live inside the ancient god that have three forms. The first form has no offensive capabilities.

The second form, all of the hairs on its body would shrink and it would morph into various shapes inside the ancient god’s body. This second form usually meant that it was sleeping.

The third and final state, Their hairs will extend and could reach up to the same length as its body. If one encountered a Moongazer Serpent in that state, they should immediately run, or they would risk being attacked.
